message:
feat(disclosure): propagate sanitized disclosure metadata through mail, state, and robot layers

Add disclosure metadata fields (subject_disclosure, preview_disclosure,
body_disclosure, title_disclosure) throughout the mail pipeline and
runtime state store so consumers can distinguish visible vs. redacted
content without re-parsing raw strings.

Key changes:
- serve/mail.go: new MailInboxMessageResponse/MailMessageResponse types
  with disclosure fields; sanitizeMailText/sanitizeInboxMessage helpers
  route all mail text through NormalizeDisclosureText before serving API
  responses; comprehensive server_test.go suite added
- robot/mail_check.go: MailCheckMessage gains SubjectDisclosure,
  PreviewDisclosure, BodyDisclosure; extraction factored into
  mailCheckMessageFromInbox using adapters.NormalizeDisclosureText
- state/runtime_schema.go + runtime_store.go: RuntimeCoordination gains
  LastMessageSubject/Preview + their disclosure fields; RuntimeWork gains
  TitleDisclosure; SQL queries and upserts updated throughout
- state/migrations: 009_runtime_coordination_disclosure and
  010_runtime_work_disclosure add the new columns via ALTER TABLE
- agent/patterns.go + parser.go: add full Ollama agent type support
  (header/rate-limit/working/idle/error patterns, detection, fallback
  frequency scoring, and rate-limit/working dispatch)
- swarm/auto_respawner.go + limit_detector.go: fix channel send race;
  trySendEvent holds RLock across nil-check and send so Stop() cannot
  close the channel in the window between checks
- cass/inject.go: wire TopicFilter into FilterResults so topic-based
  scoring multipliers and exclusions are actually applied
- robot/synthesis.go: fix matchesPattern to handle wildcard suffixes
  and base-name glob matching; extract matchesWildcard helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+func TestDebugIdle(t *testing.T) {
+	p := NewParser()
+	output := "Task completed successfully.\nWhat would you like me to do next?\nHuman: "
+	state, _ := p.Parse(output)
+	fmt.Printf("Type: %v\n", state.Type)
+	fmt.Printf("IsIdle: %v\n", state.IsIdle)
+	fmt.Printf("IsWorking: %v\n", state.IsWorking)
+	fmt.Printf("WorkIndicators: %v\n", state.WorkIndicators)
+}

+-- NTM State Store: Runtime Work Disclosure Fields
+-- Version: 010
+-- Description: Persists machine-readable disclosure metadata for runtime work titles
+-- Bead: bd-j9jo3.3.5
+
+ALTER TABLE runtime_work ADD COLUMN title_disclosure TEXT;

@@ -186,10 +186,11 @@ type RuntimeWork struct {

-	Status   string `json:"status"` // open, in_progress, closed
-	Priority int    `json:"priority"`
-	BeadType string `json:"bead_type"`
+	Title           string `json:"title"`
+	TitleDisclosure string `json:"title_disclosure,omitempty"` // JSON DisclosureMetadata
+	Status          string `json:"status"`                     // open, in_progress, closed

+	BeadType        string `json:"bead_type"`
 
 	// Assignment
 	Assignee  string     `json:"assignee,omitempty"`
@@ -230,9 +231,13 @@ type RuntimeCoordination struct {

+	UrgentCount                  int    `json:"urgent_count"`
+	LastMessageSubject           string `json:"last_message_subject,omitempty"`
+	LastMessageSubjectDisclosure string `json:"last_message_subject_disclosure,omitempty"` // JSON DisclosureMetadata
+	LastMessagePreview           string `json:"last_message_preview,omitempty"`
+	LastMessagePreviewDisclosure string `json:"last_message_preview_disclosure,omitempty"` // JSON DisclosureMetadata
 
 	// Last activity
 	LastMessageAt  *time.Time `json:"last_message_at,omitempty"`
